---
title: "Clare: A Narrative in one Volume"
---

## Clare: A Narrative in one Volume

**Author:** Lizzie Alldridge
**Date:** 1878
**Imprint:** London: Marcus Ward

### Notes

This appeared in the publisher\'s \'Bluebell\' series, alongside CMY\'s [[cmybook:125]<i>The Disturbing Element</i>].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
